title: ULTRACRAFT: Infinite Mining
description: this mod adds cosmetics, armors, weapons and even bosses
body:
Not to be confused with other ULTRACRAFT mod
this mod was created by one (1) dev (me)

There are armor sets/morphs and weaponry
Includes 2 bosses: Minos Prime and Sisyphus Prime
1 something wicked

**!Important! turn off _/gamerule mobGriefing_ if you don't want bosses to destroy everything!** some weapons also destroy terrain

Has not been tested in multiplayer

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8KXX4N2yHUM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

featuring weird and incomprehensible bugs
